name: menubar
description: A horizontal application menubar (File / Edit / View ...) following the WAI-ARIA APG menubar pattern, matched to Radix Menubar; Left/Right move between menus, Down opens, roving tabindex, one open menu at a time, submenus + checkbox/radio items.
docs: Register <lv-menubar> by importing components/ui/menubar.ts from your entry point. Pass `menus` as an array of { key, label, disabled?, items } where items are { key, label, icon?, shortcut?, disabled?, type?: 'item'|'checkbox'|'radio'|'separator'|'submenu', checked?, radioGroup?, children? }. Listen for `lv-select` (detail = { menu, key }) and `lv-checked-change` (detail = { menu, key, checked }).
